name: NEIPA The Cosmic Turtle - New England IPA
description: A delicious NEIPA with a huge amount of Citra, Mosaic, Amarillo and El Dorado hops; a crushable, hazy and tropical hop bomb.

name: Check This Stout - Pastry Stout
description: Honeycomb and chocolate come together in this liquid chocolate bar; it’s super decadent and incredibly moreish.

name: All Hopped Up - IPA
description: A BIG IPA with flavours of grapefruit, mango and papaya with a piney finish. We’ve smashed it full of Citra Lupomax, Citra Dynaboost, Idaho 7 CGX and a splash of Amarillo.

name: Forgot To Take My Pils - Hoppy Pilsner
description: Old school hops meet new school drops: Saaz, Perle, Hallertau Blanc & Mandarina Bavaria combine in this wonderfully crisp and refreshing pilsner.
